name: super-mega-fotbal-2026
description: Telepíthető magyar NB I 2025/26 kocsmai fociskártya-játék

scripts.mobile:add:android: npm run mobile:prepare && npx cap add android
scripts.mobile:sync:android: npm run mobile:prepare && npx cap sync android
scripts.test:mobile-layout: node scripts/mobile-layout-smoke.mjs && node scripts/mobile-selection-smoke.mjs && node scripts/mobile-phase-smoke.mjs
